example.question: From what we have here, which offerings sit under the Loyalty Cloud family at the companies in scope?
example.gold_cypher:
MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(:BusinessSegment)-[:OFFERS]->(root:Offering)
MATCH (root)-[:OFFERS*0..]->(o:Offering)
WHERE root.name IN $offerings AND root.company_name = c.name AND o.company_name = c.name
RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS company, o.name AS offering ORDER BY company, offering

example.question: In this graph, does Lattice Finance have a segment that serves financial services firms?
example.gold_cypher:
MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:BusinessSegment)
WHERE s.company_name = c.name AND c.name IN $companies
MATCH (s)-[:SERVES]->(:CustomerType {name: $customer_type})
RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT s.name) > 0 AS is_match

example.question: In this graph, list the business segments at Lattice Finance named Enterprise Banking that serve large enterprises and sell through system integrators.
example.gold_cypher:
MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:BusinessSegment)
WHERE s.company_name = c.name AND c.name IN $companies AND s.name IN $segments
MATCH (s)-[:SERVES]->(:CustomerType {name: $customer_type})
MATCH (s)-[:SELLS_THROUGH]->(:Channel {name: $channel})
RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS company, s.name AS segment ORDER BY company, segment

Which business segments belong to companies operating in Latin America and sell through distributors?
example.gold_cypher:
MATCH (company:Company)-[:OPERATES_IN]->(place:Place)
WHERE any(requested_place IN $places WHERE requested_place = place.name OR requested_place IN coalesce(place.includes_places, []) OR requested_place IN coalesce(place.within_places, []))
WITH DISTINCT company
MATCH (company:Company)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:BusinessSegment)
WHERE s.company_name = company.name
MATCH (s)-[:SELLS_THROUGH]->(:Channel {name: $channel})
RETURN DISTINCT company.name AS company, s.name AS segment ORDER BY company, segment

example.question: List the companies among Lattice Finance and Redwood Retail that have the Analytics segment that serves retailers and sells through direct sales.

MATCH (s)-[:SERVES]->(:CustomerType {name: $customer_type})
MATCH (s)-[:SELLS_THROUGH]->(:Channel {name: $channel})

example.question: Based on this graph, list the business segments for companies operating in Italy that serve retailers.
example.gold_cypher:
MATCH (company:Company)-[:OPERATES_IN]->(place:Place)
WHERE any(requested_place IN $places WHERE requested_place = place.name OR requested_place IN coalesce(place.includes_places, []) OR requested_place IN coalesce(place.within_places, []))
WITH DISTINCT company
MATCH (company:Company)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:BusinessSegment)
WHERE s.company_name = company.name
MATCH (s)-[:SERVES]->(:CustomerType {name: $customer_type})
RETURN DISTINCT company.name AS company, s.name AS segment ORDER BY company, segment

example.gold_cypher:
MATCH (company:Company)-[:OPERATES_IN]->(place:Place)
WHERE any(requested_place IN $places WHERE requested_place = place.name OR requested_place IN coalesce(place.includes_places, []) OR requested_place IN coalesce(place.within_places, []))
WITH DISTINCT company
MATCH (company:Company)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:BusinessSegment)
WHERE s.company_name = company.name
MATCH (s)-[:SERVES]->(:CustomerType {name: $customer_type})
RETURN DISTINCT company.name AS company, s.name AS segment ORDER BY company, segment

example.gold_cypher:
MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:BusinessSegment)
WHERE s.company_name = c.name AND c.name IN $companies
MATCH (s)-[:SELLS_THROUGH]->(:Channel {name: $channel})
RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT s.name) > 0 AS is_match

example.question: From what we have here, name the companies that have a business segment that serves consumers.
example.gold_cypher:
MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:BusinessSegment)
WHERE s.company_name = c.name
MATCH (s)-[:SERVES]->(:CustomerType {name: $customer_type})
RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS company ORDER BY company

WHERE s.company_name = c.name
MATCH (s)-[:SERVES]->(:CustomerType {name: $customer_type})
MATCH (s)-[:SELLS_THROUGH]->(:Channel {name: $channel})
RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS company ORDER BY company

Which companies can serve IT teams and healthcare firms when you look across their segments?
example.gold_cypher:
MATCH (c:Company)
MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s1:BusinessSegment)
WHERE s1.company_name = c.name
MATCH (s1)-[:SERVES]->(:CustomerType {name: $customer_type_1})
MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s2:BusinessSegment)
WHERE s2.company_name = c.name
MATCH (s2)-[:SERVES]->(:CustomerType {name: $customer_type_2})
RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS company ORDER BY company
